ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_monitoring" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "conditioner_inlet_temp" REAL /* Temperature at the inlet of the conditioner */,
  "conditioner_outlet_temp" REAL /* Temperature at the outlet of the conditioner */,
  "coal_feeder_rate" REAL /* Rate at which coal is fed into the system */,
  "primary_air_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of primary air */,
  "primary_air_split" REAL /* Split ratio of primary air */,
  "system_secondary_air_flow_total" REAL /* Total flow rate of secondary air */,
  "secondary_air_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of secondary air */,
  "secondary_air_split" REAL /* Split ratio of secondary air */,
  "tertiary_air_split" REAL /* Split ratio of tertiary air */,
  "total_comb_air_flow" REAL /* Total combined air flow */,
  "supp_fuel_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of supplementary fuel */,
  "main_flm_int" REAL /* Intensity of the main flame */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "coal_quality" TEXT /* Quality of coal used in the combustion process */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions levels */,
  "sox_emissions" REAL /* SOx emissions levels */,
  "co_emissions" REAL /* CO emissions levels */,
  "o2_levels" REAL /* O2 levels in the flue gas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, flow rate) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Description or reference to the maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "system_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_system_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., conditioner, feeder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component's function */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., operational, offline) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Description of actions taken during the access */,
  "actions_taken_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of actions taken, including changes to settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, ad-hoc) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the sensor provides */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data provided by the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_mapping_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_mapping_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
